That's probably how he was able to make it so long, being cared for by the madam as long as he makes enough to "earn" his keep. The one night you muster the courage to lose your virginity to one of the beautiful women at the Velvet Fang, Katsu is short one man he needs to please in order not to be beaten that night.. so he does the only thing he knows how; beg.
